input: Run stakeholder mapping on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected stakeholder mapping output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the stakeholder mapping workflow

input: Apply stakeholder mapping to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive stakeholder mapping analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to stakeholder mapping

input: Run stakeholder mapping but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply stakeholder mapping but requirements contradict each other
expected_behavior: Skill detects contradiction, flags with [OPEN] tag, proposes resolution
